CustomField.formula:
IMAGE(
CASE( Status ,
"Policy - Live", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif",
"Quote Provided", "/img/samples/flag_green.gif",
"Quote Referred", "/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif",
"Quote Declined", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif",
"Closed Lost", "/img/samples/flag_red.gif",
"/s.gif"),
"Stage Flag")
CustomField.label: Status
